module Config.Workflows.DeployVite

let render() =
    Config.Workflows.DeployCommon.render {
        WorkflowName = "Deploy Vibe" 💃🎵
        SourceFolder = "main"
        TargetRepo = "new-reactproj"
        TargetBranch = "main"
        TokenName = "GH_PAGES_TOKEN"
    }
	
	Folder		Repo						Workflow				URL (give me a visit!)	Type of Webapp(s)					
	doc 		docs-pages 					deploy-docs				docs.shel.sh			zensical docs
	app 		app-pages 					deploy-app	 			app.shel.sh				standalone html 	(no build)
	lab 		providers 					deploy-lab 				providers.shel.sh		vite+react+tailwind (no build)
	vite 		reactproj 					deploy-vite				turtleprotect.org		vite+react+tailwind
	pages 		vibe-pages 					deploy-pages 			vibe.shel.sh			github jekyll 		(no build)
	blog 		CommanderTurtle.github.io   deploy-blog				shel.sh					jekyll bundle
